text:
The authority shall prepare annually a complete and detailed written report accounting for all funds received and disbursed by the authority during the preceding fiscal year. The annual report must meet the reporting requirements applicable to financial reporting provided by the General Appropriations Act.

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Vernon’s Civil Statutes, Section 6(i), Art/Sec 4413(37) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B. 604 ), Sec. 5.24, eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1006. Motor Vehicle Crime Prevention Auth.
##### § 1006.155 — Annual Financial Report

The authority shall prepare annually a complete and detailed written report accounting for all funds received and disbursed by the authority during the preceding fiscal year. The annual report must meet the reporting requirements applicable to financial reporting provided by the General Appropriations Act.

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Vernon’s Civil Statutes, Section 6(i), Art/Sec 4413(37) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B. 604 ), Sec. 5.24, eff. September 1, 2019.
